items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 2 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「OpenAI CEO Altman is now "pretty sure" AI is net job-creating, which is quite the pivot from predicting mass layoffs」、「How to Evaluate General-Purpose Robot Policies for Real-World Deployment」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
actionItems: 评估是否可沉淀到团队 AI Native / Agent 自进化链路：OpenAI CEO Altman is now "pretty sure" AI is net job-creating, which is quite the pivot from predicting mass layoffs

items.title: OpenAI CEO Altman is now "pretty sure" AI is net job-creating, which is quite the pivot from predicting mass layoffs
items.summary: 这篇内容聚焦「AI 技术演进和可复用工程实践」。原文摘要显示：OpenAI CEO Sam Altman now says he's "pretty sure" AI has created more jobs than it's eliminated. That's a sharp turn from his earlier warnings about entire professions disappearing. Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei is walking…
items.insightText: 先快速判断它是否包含可复用方法、架构或工程经验，再决定是否进入日报深读。
